faqs.question: When are stink bugs most active in Harrison?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are most problematic in Harrison during fall (September through November) when they seek warm shelter for winter, and again in spring (March-May) when they emerge. The village's tree-lined streets and proximity to wooded areas make Harrison properties particularly attractive to these pests during seasonal migrations.

faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 stink bug treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes a thorough inspection of your Harrison property, targeted interior and exterior applications, sealing of common entry points, removal of visible stink bugs, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity, with most Harrison homes falling in the mid-range.

faqs.question: Are stink bug treatments safe for my Harrison home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products specifically chosen for residential safety in Westchester communities like Harrison.
